author: Afzal Khan
text: I’ve been using Delta & Gamma Waves Sleep for a few weeks and I’m really impressed! The combination of delta, gamma, alpha and theta brain-wave frequencies alongside binaural beats is deeply relaxing and surprisingly effective. The sleep and relaxation tracks help calm my mind before bed, and the focus & productivity sessions are great for getting into a flow state. The audio quality is clear, the interface is clean and easy-to-navigate, and I appreciate how the developer has designed distinct.

reply_text: Hi there, I'm sorry to hear you didn’t like the app! Reach out to support@calm.com if you’d like to provide additional feedback.

reply_text: Hi there, We offer a free version of the app in addition to the free trial and paid subscription options. Simply tap the 'X' on any free trial or subscription offers to go back to our free app. Reach out to support@calm.com for assistance accessing the free content!

It was a great app many years ago, but nowadays, there's better alternatives for a fraction of the price... plus lots of free options too!

author: Toni Holloway
text: I enjoyed it to start with, so much that I took out a subscription. Due to my financial situation I had to stop the subscription, and since then the free content is now so limited and difficult to find I'm going to uninstall it. There are plenty of good mindfulness apps with free content, I don't appreciate feeling bullied into taking out a subscription by an app that's supposed to be good for my wellbeing. Sadly it's just become a money-making machine.

author: Lindsay Spates
text: I am appalled by the television ad and the dangerous misinformation about stimulating the vagus nerve with SOUND! As an epileptic I know for a FACT that you need a medical implant in order to stimulate the vagus nerve! You are going to make people think they can use your app to manage their seizures! This is dangerous and disgusting advertising!

author: Shelly Elliott
text: Went from a rating of a 5 to a 1. Worked for so long, but now it doesn't. Sometimes the sound works with my screen closed, sometimes not, despite auto-off timer being set to 8 hours. Then two notifications to "breathe" every time I opened the app or played with my profile. So I uninstalled and reinstalled - now sound won't work it all. So finally have just uninstalled it. Not sure what the devs implemented to prod for this app over the past few months, but some serious rollbacks are needed.

author: Sooze
text: There are so many options to choose from, whatever you need to help calm your mind or help you drift off to sleep. I'm really enjoying trying it out.. It's been a long time since I've done something positive for myself. My family & friends will also benefit from the more grounded, relaxed me. It's also helping my mental health, I suffer with bouts of anxiety, agoraphobia & depression. Thank you

If these bugs persist I'd probably look at cancelling and using a different app. Please keep this in mind when downloading this!!
